description: A PI needs an official report of all expenditures for a grant that is ending to submit to the funding agency.

nodes.task_description: Identify the PI and the grant account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the identity of the PI and the grant.

nodes.task_description: Generate a complete financial report for the entire grant period from the financial system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates the detailed expenditure report.

nodes.task_description: Review the report with the PI to ensure accuracy before they submit it.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent and PI review the report together and confirm its accuracy.
